source: user request: solve expanded audit findings

task.title: Restructure project filesystem and dogfood boundary
task.summary: Tidy CodeWiki house by moving package code to root src, consolidating public skills, clarifying that .codewiki is dogfood state rather than package source, and removing the confusing top-level infrastructure layer.

goal.outcome: Project file structure matches the agreed root-src, single-skill, dogfood-state boundary without adding new behavior.
acceptance: Pi extension entry resolves from src/index.ts and package manifest/files no longer require extensions/codewiki.
Only skills/codewiki/SKILL.md is a public CodeWiki skill; loop/playbook instructions live under that skill as supporting markdown.
Project Pi system prompt appends a clear .codewiki dogfood-state-not-source-code boundary.
Tests and docs reference moved source paths consistently.

Top-level src/infrastructure does not exist; gateway policy, graph rebuild orchestration, knowledge parsing, and local runtime helpers live under src/application/** while harness/web translation stays under src/adapters/**.
scripts/ contains only active dev/CLI scripts; package smoke lives under tests/smoke and stale transaction duplication is removed.
Architecture/type checks pass or blockers are documented.
Task-specific acceptance coverage lives under tests/tasks/TASK-076/ with trace metadata.
non_goals: Change compiler semantics beyond file/storage path naming required by the restructure.

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Implementation validation must not reuse builder thought context.

next_loop.reason: The next gateway must independently validate implementation evidence.

summary: TASK-076 expanded audit cleanup fixed stale source/docs, repoPath resolution, generated task view drift, build/validation health, gateway safety, strict type/dead-code checks, package lock/audit, and split large docs.

validation: codewiki_state green health, open 0, observe/no action

checks_run: node scripts/codewiki-gateway.mjs run /tmp/nope.js (blocked as removed unsafe command)

notes: Current Pi process may still have old loaded tool modules for repoPath behavior until /reload; package smoke validates fresh loader behavior.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: Added ancestor wiki root resolution in application/project.ts for repoPath/cwd inputs.
Generated/pruned roadmap task view files during graph rebuild and linted canonical task ids/task-view parity.
Ignored historical fail/block validation reconciliation after target task is closed.
Removed npx gateway fallback and gated unsafe local script execution.
Enabled strict/no-unused TypeScript and removed unused imports/dead symbols.
Added package-lock.json and split large UI docs to clear lint warnings.
notes: Large source UI files remain candidates for future low-risk extraction, but current pass avoided behavior-heavy UI rewrites beyond strict/no-unused cleanup.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

code_change_evidence: Added ancestor wiki root resolution in application/project.ts for repoPath/cwd inputs.
Generated/pruned roadmap task view files during graph rebuild and linted canonical task ids/task-view parity.
Ignored historical fail/block validation reconciliation after target task is closed.
Removed npx gateway fallback and gated unsafe local script execution.
Enabled strict/no-unused TypeScript and removed unused imports/dead symbols.
Added package-lock.json and split large UI docs to clear lint warnings.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: No stale setup source or obsolete script refs remain.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Deleted src/application/setup.ts; architecture check and stale-path grep pass.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: repoPath accepts any path inside target repo.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Added tests/smoke/project-resolution.test.mjs and package smoke nested repoPath assertion.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Generated task dirs match queue truth.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Graph rebuild now writes/prunes .codewiki/roadmap/tasks/* task/context files; queue/directory parity script reports no missing/stale/noncanonical ids.
codewiki_state reports green health, open 0, no reconciliation action.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Gateway runtime execution no longer looks sandboxed.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Gateway run removed; unsafe-run requires CODEWIKI_ALLOW_UNSAFE_RUN=1; npx fallback removed.
tsconfig enables strict, noUnusedLocals, noUnusedParameters; npm run typecheck passes.
package-lock.json added; npm audit --audit-level=moderate --omit=dev found 0 vulnerabilities.

closure_brief.user_intent: Solve all issues found in the expanded tidy-up audit.
implemented_changes: Deleted stale/unreachable setup source and stale command text.
Fixed repoPath resolution from nested paths and added direct/package smoke coverage.
Regenerated/pruned roadmap task views and canonicalized task ids.
Backfilled missing build metadata, closed stale verify tasks, and prevented closed-task block validations from driving current reconciliation.
Removed gateway npx fallback, removed plain run command, and gated unsafe-run.
Enabled strict/no-unused TypeScript and cleaned dead symbols.
Added package-lock.json, ran audit, and split large UI docs to clear lint warnings.
acceptance_evidence: CodeWiki state is green, open 0, no next reconciliation action.
Full test suite and npm audit pass.
non_goals_preserved: No broad behavioral UI source split was attempted beyond safe strict/no-unused cleanup.
remaining_risks: Current Pi process may need /reload to pick up new tool module code.

risks: Current interactive Pi tool cache may require /reload to use new repoPath resolution in codewiki_state.

commit.title: chore(codewiki): record TASK-076 Restructure project filesystem and dogfood boundary implementation evidence
commit.body:
TASK-076 expanded audit cleanup fixed stale source/docs, repoPath resolution, generated task view drift, build/validation health, gateway safety, strict type/dead-code checks, package lock/audit, and split large docs.

Checks: npm run typecheck, npm run check:architecture, npm run test:features, npm run test:smoke, npm run test:pack, npm test, npm audit --audit-level=moderate --omit=dev, node scripts/codewiki-gateway.mjs manifest, node scripts/codewiki-gateway.mjs run /tmp/nope.js (blocked as removed unsafe command), CODEWIKI_ALLOW_UNSAFE_RUN=1 node scripts/codewiki-gateway.mjs unsafe-run /tmp/codewiki-unsafe-run-smoke.js
Validation: no durable validation refs recorded.
Remote publication requires explicit approval; this build is recommendation-only.
